title: 20:38 ГўВЂВ” October 7, 2020
body_text:
20:38 ГўВЂВ” October 7, 2020
Wires Part Update
We updated the Wires Part to reflect new functionality that enables authorized users to create a return wire using the Wires application. Users no longer have to use MTS to return wires. Returned wires display a status of ГўВЂВњReturnedГўВЂВќ in Wires and MTS. We also added clarity to the Wires user set up procedures.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Chapter 5, Wires Access and Administration
We clarified the Wires user set up procedures.
Section 10.1, Overview of Wires Lists
We updated the Status Type list to reflect the status type ГўВЂВњReturnedГўВЂВќ.
Chapter 17, Returning Incoming Wires
We added procedures for creating a return wire in the Wires application. Authorized users can return a wire from the Pending Incoming list and Received Wires list. The status of returned wires displays as ГўВЂВњReturnedГўВЂВќ in Wires and MTS.
